content.text:
Проверю на живом тесте: создам маленький PR в `main` и посмотрю, отработает ли бот.

Сначала свежий `main` и тестовая ветка с безобидным изменением:

input.command:
set -e
git fetch origin main >/dev/null 2>&1
echo "=== workflow есть в origin/main? ==="
git ls-tree origin/main -- .github/workflows/pr-agent.yml
git checkout -b test/pr-agent-smoke origin/main >/dev/null 2>&1
git branch --show-current
input.description: Create smoke-test branch off fresh main

result.output:
=== workflow есть в origin/main? ===
100644 blob 2505c02087e06e118f797cc08026f651ce37b31e	.github/workflows/pr-agent.yml
test/pr-agent-smoke

content.text: Workflow на месте. Делаю небольшое осмысленное изменение (чтобы боту было что описывать/ревьюить) и открываю PR:

input.content:
"""Smoke-test helper for the PR-Agent (GLM-5) GitHub Actions workflow.

This file exists only to give PR-Agent a small, self-contained diff to
describe and review. Safe to delete once the workflow is confirmed working.
"""

from __future__ import annotations


def summarize_changes(files: list[str]) -> str:
    """Return a one-line summary of changed files.

    Intentionally trivial so the PR-Agent review has something to comment on.
    """
    if not files:
        return "no files changed"
    count = len(files)
    noun = "file" if count == 1 else "files"
    return f"{count} {noun} changed: {', '.join(sorted(files))}"


if __name__ == "__main__":
    print(summarize_changes(["a.py", "b.py"]))

result.output: File created successfully at: /Users/aleksishmanov/projects/po-helper/.claude/worktrees/glm5-code-review-agent-72cd89/scripts/pr_agent_smoke.py (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

input.command:
set -e
git add scripts/pr_agent_smoke.py
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
test: smoke-test file to verify PR-Agent (GLM-5) workflow

Temporary helper so the PR-Agent bot has a small diff to describe and
review. To be reverted after the workflow is confirmed working.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" >/dev/null
git push -u origin test/pr-agent-smoke 2>&1 | tail -2
gh pr create --base main --head test/pr-agent-smoke \
  --title "test: smoke-test PR-Agent (GLM-5) workflow" \
  --body "Проверка автоматики PR-Agent на GLM-5. Ожидаем: авто-описание, ревью и предложения от бота. После подтверждения — закрыть без мержа." 2>&1 | tail -1
input.description: Commit, push and open smoke-test PR
